barRaise.topFinding: Both code-correctness HIGHs from the 2026-05-30 review are still shipping live and zero commits landed since, so the verdict escalates from at-risk to stalled. fog_of_war._vision_for_compute still dispatches on ballista_tower / mortar_tower / repeater_tower and tent / cottage (source/systems/fog_of_war.gd:483,487-489), filenames the v0.80.0 rename deleted, so every tower and housing tier falls through to VISION_STRUCTURE_DEFAULT and ships the wrong fog radius. save_load still persists the script basename as the class key with no save_version field (source/autoloads/save_load.gd:347,502), so pre-rename saves silently drop renamed buildings on load. The S-34 Phase B / multimesh decision is unmade for a fifth cycle (all eight use_multimesh_* flags false). Newly surfaced this run: the YaE landing card still pitches HBH as an 'industrial nightmare in oil paint' with Mines / lumberyards / farms (index.html:1490), contradicting the far-colony canonical the GDD locked in v0.74.0. The project was highly active through 2026-05-29 (~15 releases that day); this is a single-cycle stall on the criticals, not abandonment, but the warned-about bugs are reaching the running game.
